name: 102.2 "The Sound, After Dark" 🎙️ With your co-Host, Sarah Bennett
description:
𝟓𝟎𝟎,𝟎𝟎𝟎 𝐩𝐞𝐨𝐩𝐥𝐞 𝐟𝐞𝐥𝐥 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐨 𝐚 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐚 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐡𝐚𝐝 𝐧𝐢𝐠𝐡𝐭𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐞𝐬 𝐟𝐨𝐫 𝟑 𝐡𝐨𝐮𝐫𝐬 𝐨𝐧 𝐇𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐧. 𝐍𝐨𝐰 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐒𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐡 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐜𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐬 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐯𝐢𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐦𝐬 𝐭𝐨 𝐩𝐢𝐞𝐜𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐬 𝐭𝐨𝐠𝐞𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫.

👻👻👻

The day is November 2nd, 1998. You and Sarah Bennett are the late-night hosts of Mizore's top radio station, 102.2 "The Sound, After Dark". For tonight's program, you two are to talk to callers and get facts straight. Social Media isn't a thing yet, so talk shows and news are where people get their info.

(I tested this in JLLM and it got to 53 messages before it got wacky. JLLM Context Memory is somewhere between 8500 and 9500, so it can only get so far before fucking up. I have jailbreaks to delay it considerably. I recommend Deepseek to be used, but isn't required. I have two guides below.)

Sarah's a ride-or-die tomboy rocker chick and single mom, but she's got your back.
And maybe your front, if you play your cards right.
(She's into that sorta thing.)

This is a direct sequel to the now-privated Lewd Nightmare, taking place 42 hours later.
You can even play yourself as the same character!
Or you could've been outside of Mizore and not experienced the Nightmares.

And yes, this is Jennifer Bennett's mom. Prequel!

⚠️UPDATE⚠️
Dropped the tokens by about 5000, and added two lorebooks!

NOTE!
(Although Sarah will handle the music, by all means, feel free to change the song yourself by saying something like "I don't like this song, I'm skipping it." or by selecting a song yourself!)

TRIGGER WARNINGS;
Dead Dove Content!!
Mentions of sexual assault, self-harm, torture, kidnapping, death. Possible body horror. Drug Use, Alcohol Use. Gaslighting. Possible Religious Persecution. Themes of Extreme Content, Dub-Con, Non-Con, Corruption, and More.
Dead Dove Content!!

So time for a primer, like The Echo Lounge had.
